risk_if_not_implemented: Without Automated Alerts, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Monitoring Reporting
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to provide an event log report generation capability to aid in detecting and assessing anomalous activities.
compensating_control_1.justification: Monitoring Reporting (MON-06) provides detective monitoring capability that compensates for the absence of Automated Alerts (MON-01.12) by identifying unauthorized, anomalous, or non-compliant activity that the primary control would have prevented. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Security, Compliance & Resilience Assessments
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to regularly review processes and documented procedures to ensure conformity with the organization's security, compliance and/or resilience policies, standards and other applicable requirements.
compensating_control_2.justification: Security, Compliance & Resilience Assessments (CPL-03) provides periodic assessment and assurance that compensates for the absence of Automated Alerts (MON-01.12) by providing structured evaluation of the environment to surface gaps and verify residual control effectiveness. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
